patch.value: Key findings: (1) defineExtension identity helper works correctly. (2) All 9 capabilities are enumerated. (3) CLI contracts include flag metadata with aliases for all commands. (4) Starter extension activates cleanly with all capabilities. (5) SDK docs at docs/SDK.md and docs/EXTENSIONS.md are comprehensive. (6) Extension scaffold (pm extension --init) produces working starter projects. (7) Extension doctor with deep detail shows clean reports.
Feature: SDK exports complete with 78 public symbols

SDK verified: 78 public exports from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk including defineExtension, EXTENSION_CAPABILITIES (9 capabilities), PM_TOOL_ACTIONS (68 actions), PM_CORE_COMMAND_NAMES (53 commands), flag contracts for all command families, Pi wrapper contracts, and type exports.
SDK exports match documentation and all extension capabilities are exercisable

value.author: audit-agent
value.text: Evidence: 78 SDK exports verified via dynamic import. defineExtension returns identity. Starter extension with all 9 capabilities activated with 0 errors. Extension doctor deep mode shows clean status. PM_TOOL_PARAMETERS_SCHEMA v4 schema is well-structured.

patch.value: 78 SDK exports verified via dynamic import. defineExtension identity, 9 capabilities, 68 tool actions, 53 command names, and flag contracts all match docs
